rag_rules: Use AGREE logical operators and implication for contract expressions
Place component type contracts in type scope annexes with visible feature references
Generate syntactically valid AGREE annex blocks with proper assume/guarantee structure
generic_rules: Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations
Use nested if-then-else for branching logic in AGREE
Declare constants and equations with correct AGREE scalar types (int, real, bool)
Place implementation-level assignments only in implementation scopes with valid outputs
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Use `assume "label": expression;` and `guarantee "label": expression;` for contract statements
Equation declarations use `eq name : type = expression;` syntax
Constants are declared with `const name : type = value;`
anti_patterns: Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope
Do not reference AADL property names as AGREE variables
Do not use opaque Boolean data in numeric comparisons
Do not introduce package-qualified identifiers not present in the AADL model
irrelevant_topics: AADL package references and with clauses
Model fusion and owner/scope preservation rules
Component type vs implementation scope boundaries
